violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by boxes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The prep unit and 2 draw cooler by the cooking line was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken wings 50DF, Steak tips 50DF, Pastrami 50DF, Cheese 50 DF, Tuna Salad 50DF, Corned Beef 50DF, and Grilled Veggies 50DF. Food items voluntarily disposed of. Establishment to use working unit until repair is made. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The floor behind the bar is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2026
The gasket located on the walk in cooler door and the freezer door was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024

The floor behind the bar area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment to explore option for making repair to floor. Establishment to discuss repairs with DOH. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024
